$slots.body: Enter the email addresses of the people you'd like to invite to this workspace. They'll receive a link to join.
$slots.footer: <button type="button" class="rounded-button px-4 py-2 text-sm font-heading text-on-surface hover:bg-surface-raised" data-modal-close>Cancel</button><button type="button" class="rounded-button bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-heading text-primary-contrast hover:opacity-90">Send invites</button>
